name: Brand Story
description: Longer-form cinematic brand narrative (30-60s, sometimes 60-120s for hero films): founder voice or customer transformation arc carries problem → mission → solution → impact. Tonal opposite of fast-cut UGC: contemplative pacing, authentic detail, emotional restraint. Reference-required — a real brand identity (logo, founder photo / archive material, product, environment) must be supplied; AI cannot improvise a brand. Best for about-us videos, origin stories, mission films, anniversary spots, investor narrative, manifesto.

stackSummary.keyframes: google/gemini-3-pro-image-preview via OpenRouter, multi-ref WITH user-supplied brand reference (founder photo, logo, product, environment). Required for any frame that names or shows a real brand or person.
stackSummary.i2v: kwaivgi/kling-v3.0-pro via OpenRouter for primary cinematic clips (5s each, 6-12 total for a 30-60s film). Veo-3.1 acceptable as a premium upgrade for hero shots. generate_audio: false — VO and music are added in post.
stackSummary.voiceover: ElevenLabs eleven_multilingual_v2. Two common modes: (1) founder-voice mode — single sustained warm conversational delivery; (2) customer-testimony mode — interview-style, slightly less polished, emotional honesty. Language follows the brief; prefer the founder/customer's actual language.
stackSummary.captions: OpenRouter whisper-1; MinimalCaptions throughout (calm, low-distraction). Avoid Hormozi-style impact captions — they fight the cinematic register.
stackSummary.music: ElevenLabs Music — single track that builds: sparse/ambient under setup, swells under transformation, holds a quiet note on the closing reflection. Optionally add live source audio (workshop sounds, kitchen ambience) for authenticity.

constants.structure: hook (2s) → setup (5-8s) → inciting moment (5-8s) → emergence montage (10-15s) → transformation (8-12s) → closing reflection (4-6s) → brand signature (2-3s)

variationAxes: narrative arc (founder-led origin / customer transformation / mission manifesto / day-in-the-life / behind-the-scenes / milestone-anniversary / community-spotlight / future-vision)
emotional register (inspirational / warm-nostalgic / bold-rebellious / calm-trustworthy / playful / serious-professional)
narration mode (founder VO / customer testimony / poetic philosophical / sparse strategic / pure visual no-VO / dialogue-as-narrative)
duration tier (30s social-cut, 60s hero, 90-120s long-form film)
industry framing (tech-startup / artisan-food / sustainable-fashion / health-wellness / creative-agency / nonprofit / manufacturing / education)
doNotCopyLiterally: Founder identity, brand colors, dialogue lines, archive footage, exact prompts. Vibe and arc reference only.
referenceNotes: Brand reference is REQUIRED. At minimum: logo + one founder/team photo OR archive image OR product/environment shot. Without it the reference-required gate (AGENTS.md hard rule #3) refuses. AI-improvised faces or logos in a brand-story context are never acceptable — the whole genre depends on perceived authenticity, and a single off frame collapses trust.
